name: @ai-native-solutions/falllegal-sdk
description: UK law engine + matter management primitives for SRA-regulated firms. 12 practice areas, 30 strategic weaves, statute corpus, T0 offline Q&A, hash-linked audit chain, conflict-check, SRA 6yr retention. Research only, not legal advice.

scripts.test: node -e "import('./src/index.js').then(m=>{if(m.WEAVES.length!==30)throw new Error('weaves');if(m.PRACTICE_AREAS.length!==12)throw new Error('areas');const h=m.checkConflicts({clientName:'Ada',partyOpposing:'Bob'},{clients:[{id:'c1',firstName:'Ada',lastName:'Lovelace'}],matters:[{id:'m1',partyOpposing:'Bob Ross'}]});if(h.length<2)throw new Error('conflict');console.log('OK · weaves',m.WEAVES.length,'· areas',m.PRACTICE_AREAS.length,'· conflict hits',h.length)})"

author: AI-Native Solutions
